specs.title: cut removes text and paste restores it
bracket matching - cursor next to bracket
PageDown moves cursor down a page
PageUp moves cursor up a page
Ctrl-Backspace on typed text multiple times
Ctrl-Backspace at line start crosses line boundary
Ctrl-Delete at line end crosses line boundary
Tab indents (or inserts tab depending on config)
Ctrl-k kills to end of line
find and replace panel - visual compare
search panel with query - visual compare
normal cursor on character vs empty line
C changes to end of line
D deletes to end of line
ma sets mark, 'a jumps to mark
A appends at end of line
i enters insert mode before cursor
a enters insert mode after cursor

Normal mode: editing keys modify doc correctly

specs.title: Escape exits insert mode without modifying doc
cc changes line and enters insert mode
o opens line below and enters insert mode
